benchmark_unit: whole transcript -> final note quality score

corpus_complete.note: Synthetic validation corpus reaches the planned case count.

collection_plan_complete.note: Reviewer collection plan has no underpowered required strata.

statistical_analysis_plan_prespecified.note: Analysis plan is fixed before independent clinician evidence is collected.

reviewer_intake_ready.note: Reviewer intake and public/private evidence boundaries are defined.

reviewer_training_defined.note: Reviewer training and anchor-case requirements are defined.

evidence_index_present.note: Evidence-run index is publishable and reproducible.

evidence_runs.benchmark_unit: whole transcript -> final note quality score

failed_checks.message: Evidence status supports independent clinician validation claims
Consensus ratings have no unresolved adjudication burden

blocking_gaps.message: No evidence run currently has independent clinician review status and passes validation-claim readiness.
At least one evidence run has failed validation readiness checks.

next_required_actions: Recruit qualified independent clinician reviewers and retain private eligibility records outside the public repository.
Collect complete blinded worksheet ratings for every case-submission from two qualified reviewers.
Export Scribeval judge scores for the same blinded submissions.
Resolve reviewer disagreement through qualified adjudication until no required adjudication remains.
Build a versioned independent_clinician_review evidence bundle and re-run validation-claim readiness.
Publish only aggregate, hashed, non-identifying evidence artifacts.
claim_boundary: Prepared validation materials and synthetic bootstrap evidence are not independent clinical validation. A validation claim requires a claim-ready independent clinician evidence run.
